input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.3.2
            TITLE: throttle actuation method

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.3.2: Throttle Actuation Method
IC.3.2 Throttle Actuation Method 
The throttle may be actuated:  
a. Mechanically by a cable or rod system  IC.3.3 
b. By Electronic Throttle Control  IC.4

final_answer: rule IC.3.2: Throttle Actuation Method IC.3.2 Throttle Actuation Method The throttle may be actuated: a. Mechanically by a cable or rod system IC.3.3 b. By Electronic Throttle Control IC.4
